title: Aeronautics - Create Customised
description: A NeoForge modpack focused on customising the Create mod.
body:
# <font color="#C6ECAE">⚙️ Create Customised</font> by AdoLovesChicken
**A NeoForge modpack that focuses on improving, expanding, and customising base Create.**

### NOW WITH CREATE AERONAUTICS!

## Create!
Create Customised comes jam-packed with many of Create's best addons, customised to be both balanced and fun.

## Performance
Create Customised is built with various optimisation mods available for NeoForge. It is fine-tuned to run at a stable framerate of around 150-200 average with a laptop RTX 3060, Ryzen 7-5800H, and 16gb of DDR4 ram on default settings.

## Multiplayer!
The modpack even comes with the mod [_e4mc_](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc), so you can play with friends any time you'd like! You can also pin servers using _Cherished Worlds_ so you never lose your favourite server to the others in the list!

## Any textures you'd like!
With this modpack, you are able to use most texture packs supporting the Optifine texture format.  The modpack comes with various mods that replace the custom Optifine format - you can run all the custom resource packs you want! It even comes with shaderpack support.

![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?labelColor=black&color=grey&label=&suffix=%20downloads&query=downloads&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/fuj91Net&style=flat&logo=data:image/png;base64,) ![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/fuj91Net?color=%238FA6CB)
